name: Valya Isakova || buying decorations
description:
"put those pom-poms back where you got them"

☃ goth christmas!!

Maybe decorating the apartment you share with your goth girlfriend is harder than you thought, you had convinced her to participate more in the Christmas spirit after a long talk about consumerism and capitalism on her part and now she wants to decorate everything with the most obscure and strange target decorations!

What a nerve!

anyway, convince her to let you decorate to your liking or agree to celebrate the holidays on her terms (and maybe persuade her by showing her your boobs)

[Goth | goth girlfriend | Opposite poles | goth x gyaru | goth x Lolita | wlw | saphic]

  • buying decorations (here)

  • photo with santa (ready)

  • dinner with the family

request accepted here.

I specifically thought this for a goth x Lolita/gyaru/pink girl pairing, but you can be any style as long as it's a handsome Valya to propel the scenario.

this is supposed to be a festive mini-series (late, as usual) of three Valya bots in different scenarios

I am changing the way I write the character settings so I am going to see how it works like this
